judge_reason: Description B quotes specific verbatim stamp text that Description A does not mention at all, indicating a potential fabrication or hallucination of detailed visual content.
original_image_tags: A faded, aged document with typewritten text and several stamps. The paper is yellowed, with torn edges on the left and punch holes at the top. A handwritten annotation is visible at the bottom right.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A single scanned yellowed document page with torn edges and three hole punches at the top, showing very faint mirrored typed text, a blue/purple rectangular stamp near the lower center, and a red handwritten-style number stamp at the lower right.*
